name: Latency posture
when_to_use: Response-time distribution, tail percentiles, latency budgets

name: Throughput and scalability
when_to_use: RPS ceiling, scalability curve, queueing behavior under load

name: Resource utilization
when_to_use: CPU / memory / disk / network utilization, saturation, errors

name: Distributed tracing
when_to_use: Trace coverage, sampling, span attributes, dependency-graph fidelity

name: Structured logs
when_to_use: Log structure, volume, retention, correlation with traces

name: Metrics and instrumentation
when_to_use: RED / USE / Four-Golden-Signals coverage, cardinality, aggregation

name: SLO and error-budget program
when_to_use: SLI selection, SLO target setting, error-budget policy, alerting
